name: documents
notes: A new row is inserted on every successful drag-drop upload. 'name' is taken from file.name sent in FormData; 'file_type' from Multer's detected mimetype; 'file_path' is '/uploads/{uuid}{ext}'. The 'tags' column is always NULL for uploads from this feature because the drop handler passes no tag data.
After the INSERT, a PostgreSQL trigger (trg_sync_to_v2) copies the row to documents_v2 but deliberately omits the tags column — a known schema bug documented in migration 003-create-trigger.sql.
The full documents table is also re-queried via GET /api/documents immediately after a successful upload to refresh the grid.
